title: Beyond Power
description: You want the powers of a god? Well, here you go!
body:
_“I yearned for power, for control, for the ability to shape the world as I saw fit.
I wanted to be a god, to wield creation and destruction alike.”_

Beyond Power lets you transcend mortal limits and harness divine might itself.
Earn faith, ascend through stages of godhood, and unleash devastating abilities that warp time, space, and reality.
(An even more detailed description is in the [discord](https://discord.gg/kkH2rPs9cj)!)

Core Systems - - -

**Divine Energy**
Your lifeblood of power, consumed by every ability.
Regenerates slowly, or through divine structures and rituals.

Faith System

Earn Faith through combat and good deeds.
Higher faith unlocks stronger powers and reduces cooldowns.
Alternatively, grow through Fear by embracing destruction.

Progression

Five stages of godhood, each unlocking new powers and visual effects.

Stage	Title	Unlock Method	            
**I	Initiate**	Default	                   

**II	Blessed**   Gain 50 faith.              

**III	Demi-God**	120 faith + infuse 3 Amethyst Shards at a beacon.	

**IV	Ascendant**	Gain 250 faith.

**V	True Deity**	Perform the Rite of Infinity (10 Shards + Nether Star)	Unleash your full divine potential.


Abilities by Stage

**Stage II - Blessed**

Divine Laser (Offensive): Fire a beam of pure divine energy that pierces enemies.

**Stage III - Demi-God**

Time Fracture (Utility): Slow time for everyone but yourself.

Spatial Rend (Offensive): Tear reality apart, damaging all nearby foes.

Gravity Crush (Control): Pull enemies to a point, then crush them.

Matter Convert (Utility): Transform common blocks into rarer resources.

Solar Flare (Offensive): Inflict fire and knockback on enemies.

Tectonic Wrath (Area Control): Cause quakes that shatter the earth and send shockwaves through enemies.

**Stage IV - Ascendant**

Orbital Strike (Offensive): Call down a lightning strike that destroys everything below.

Reality Collapse (Ultimate): Create a.. blob that pulls in and destroys everything nearby.

Echo of Creation (Summon): Summon vexes to fight by your side.

Void Implosion (Area Damage): Explode an area into nothingness, distorting the air around it.

Celestial Barrier (Defensive): Form a radiant shield that blocks all attacks.

Judgment Day (Ultimate): Call down divine lightning upon all who oppose you.

**Stage V - True Deity**

All abilities enhanced by +50% damage, –30% cooldown, and new visual effects.

Gain a radiant Divine Aura visible to all who gaze upon 



**Upcoming (Future Update)**

Stage VI - ???
A secret ascension known only to the stars themselves.
Rumors say it requires something… beyond faith.



**Notes**

_Sometimes ascension takes a few seconds. Patience, mortal._

Simple, hand-made pixel art, expect charm over perfection!

Expect a TON of bugs, I'm not perfect!

Requirements

Minecraft: 1.21

Loader: Fabric

Dependencies: not really anything. (pretty cool, right!)
